_comment: Unlock stage: both branches cleared — every card the Stone Age hands out before its final mission (farm/hut/conquest, burial, calendar, beer), one copy each. What a player owns arriving at Göbekli Tepe, which joins both branches. Göbekli Tepe's own wonder is that mission's reward, not an input, and its objective doesn't require building it. Sweep against `--board settlement` and `--board chiefdom`: Raiders unlocks Chiefdom alongside Settlement, so this is the first stage with a board choice.
